reference: It might be due to persistent inflammation or hypertrophic scar. In worse cases, it could be due to a reaction to suture materials or malalignment between layers of the abdominal wall during suturing, or even tuberculosis! Ultrasound could help diagnose the case. Physiotherapy might help! All the best!
text: It might be due to persistent inflammation or hypertrophic scar. In worst cases, it could be due to a reaction to sutures, materials, or malalignment between layers of the abdominal wall during surgery, or even tuberculosis. Ultrasound can help diagnose the case. Physiotherapy might help. All the best.
